summary: Preserve the rust-diffforge workspace list while adding bottom-left Agents, Files, and Vault views, add a VS Code-like read-only file explorer for the active workspace directory, and keep Vault as an honest placeholder.

review_items.summary: The authenticated desktop rail keeps the workspace list with per-workspace settings controls at the top and adds Agents, Files, and Vault entries to the bottom-left action area before Settings and Sign out.
The Agents rail item opens the existing multi-terminal local agent workspace surface.
The Files rail item opens a two-pane read-only workspace file browser with a directory explorer on the left and selected file contents on the right.
The Tauri host adds bounded read-only commands for listing directories and reading UTF-8 files under the validated workspace root.
Workspace file access rejects absolute or parent-traversing relative paths and verifies canonical file/directory targets remain inside the configured workspace root.
The Vault rail item opens a non-functional placeholder surface without claiming vault storage behavior exists.
No database schema, migration, SQL policy, or data access change is required.

patches.summary: Preserve the workspace list, add bottom-left Agents/Files/Vault routing, and implement the read-only file explorer UI.
Add read-only workspace directory listing and file reading Tauri commands.

compatibility.notes: The change is local to the authenticated desktop UI and native host command surface.
